useCases.title: Patna Coaching Institutes

useCases.title: Clinics & Hospitals
useCases.desc: Doctors and medical centers in Patna need clean, professional sites to manage patient bookings, list services, and share contact details.

faqs.q: How much does a website cost in Patna?
faqs.a: BDDN offers highly affordable website packages starting at ₹699 for a basic single-page landing page, ₹2,999 for a professional multi-page static site, and ₹14,999 for a complete, payment-integrated e-commerce store.

faqs.q: Can BDDN help my Patna business rank on Google?
faqs.a: Yes! Every website we build in Patna follows SEO best practices, including structured schema markup, clean meta tags, and high-performance loading speeds, giving your site a competitive edge on local Google searches.

faqs.q: How long does it take to deliver a website in Patna?
faqs.a: Our standard delivery time is just 7 days from the receipt of content and booking confirmation. Larger projects like e-commerce portals may take 10-15 days.
